privileged_info_summary: This is a fully synthetic school carpool fair share calculation task for LibreOffice Calc with 3 sheets (Drive Log, Family Info, Cost Summary) and 5 families (Garcia, Kim, Lee, Martinez, Thompson). Verified data: 20 drive log records with Garcia driving 7 times, Kim 3 times, Lee 4, Martinez 3, Thompson 3. Mileages are Garcia 4.2mi, Kim 5.0mi, Lee 5.8mi, Martinez 4.2mi (must update to 5.8mi), Thompson 6.5mi. Gas assumptions: $3.85/gallon, 28 MPG. Task requires: fixing broken formulas (VLOOKUP to column 3 for mileage), updating Martinez mileage to 5.8±0.1, calculating fair share (total cost ÷ 5), calculating balances (actual cost - fair share), and verifying balance reconciliation (sum ≤ ±$0.50). Verification has 6 criteria with 80% (5/6) pass threshold. Task duration: 240 seconds, max 50 steps, medium difficulty. All data is synthetically generated by setup_task.sh script.
